raw.shot type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.official description: After exploding, Biotic Grenade bounces and explodes again for 60 damage and healing.
Enemies waking up from Sleep Dart are slowed and take 50 damage for 2 seconds.
Using Nano Boost also casts it on Ana.
Nano Boost grants a 30% movement speed boost to both Ana and her target.

abilities.name: Sleep Dart

raw.official description: Fires a dart that puts an enemy to sleep.
raw.duration:
0.5 seconds (sleep min)
5 seconds (sleep max, non-tanks)
3.5 seconds (sleep max, tanks)
0.5 seconds (wakeup)
raw.ability details: * If a slept target takes damage, they will wake up prematurely in 0.5 seconds. * During casting time, you can change the future flight path. * There is an additional 0.08s delay after the startup, during which the projectile is not yet fired, but the ability can no longer be interrupted. * Duration is reduced against heroes with the [[File:Role Tank Circle.svg|sub|link=Roles#Role: Tank|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roles#Role: Tank|Role: Tank]] passive. This includes [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]

duration.raw:
0.5 seconds (sleep min)
5 seconds (sleep max, non-tanks)
3.5 seconds (sleep max, tanks)
0.5 seconds (wakeup)

abilities.name: Biotic Grenade
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Throws a grenade that heals and increases healing on allies, while damaging and preventing healing on enemies.
raw.ability details: * Passes through full HP allies. * Affected allies receive 50% additional healing, including from [[Health Pack]]s, while affected enemies cannot be healed at all. * Does not stack with healing received amplification from [[File:guardianwave.png|sub|link=Wuyang#Guardian Wave|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wuyang#Guardian Wave|Guardian Wave]]. * Healing received amplification stacks additively with the [[Global_Passive_Abilities#Healing_reduction_from_damage|Global passive]] healing received reduction. * Biotic Grenade's healing is unaffected by healing received amplification, but it can be affected by healing received reduction. * The regeneration of [[Hit points#Shields|shields]] is treated as a form of healing, meaning allies regenerate their shields 50% faster and enemies cannot regenerate their shields until the effect expires. * Has no effect on overhealth. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]], but the explosion is unaffected. * Biotic grenade can be reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage and healing dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage/healing alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: Biotic Rifle

raw.official description: Long-range rifle that heals allies and damages enemies.
raw.damage: 75 over 0.59 seconds
raw.heal: 75 over 0.59 seconds
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds
raw.ability details:
* Damage/healing per second: 93.75 while firing (83.33 overall w/ reload)
* Shots pass through full health allies and do not affect them.
* Ignores armor's damage reduction.
* Applies a damage/heal-over-time effect that can be cleansed. [[Health Pack]]s cleanse the damage-over-time.
* Using melee or zooming in/out stops fire recovery.
* After the shot, the game raises the Ana camera (changes the facing angle) by 2 units, after which it starts lowering the character's camera to its previous value (a little bit changes it). Unlike Cassidy, Ana will not be able to shoot once the camera is back in position and will have to wait.

raw.ability details:
* Besides following differences, scoped shots have the same properties as hip fire shots:
** Scoped shots are instant and leave a tracer behind.
** Ana's movement speed is reduced while aiming down sights.
** While aiming down sights, projectile size larger for allies, making it easier to heal. It is smaller for enemies.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted (allies)
raw.official description: Increases an ally's damage, while reducing damage taken.
raw.cast time: 0.128 seconds + 0.6 seconds recovery
raw.ability details: * Damage reduction buff stacking is capped at 50%. If any hero with a damage reduction effect, such as [[Bastion]] with [[File:Ironclad.png|sub|link=Bastion#Ironclad|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#Ironclad|Ironclad]], gets Nano Boosted, the damage reduction is still 50%. * In FFA Deathmatch, Ana can use Nano Boost on herself. * Nano-boosted heroes' ability sounds are sped up, including [[Lúcio]]'s songs. The song effects do not get amplified, however. * Nano Boost is a non-hitscan projectile that cannot miss and cannot be blocked. However, if the target dies before the projectile reaches them, Nano Boost gets consumed and wasted.
